feed.title: 智域前沿 · 全球科技与安全态势日报
feed.subtitle: 本期从 41 个公开信源筛选出 10 条重点事件，覆盖科技、AI、航空航天、安全动态与无人系统。

entry.title: Embraer, Anduril pursuing Barracuda missiles on C-390
entry.summary: Embraer and Anduril signed an MOU on the Barracuda missile, though no timeline for a first test was available. 关键事实：Embraer and Anduril signed an MOU on the Barracuda missile, though no timeline for a first test was available.

entry.title: Huge fire at Ukraine shopping centre after Russian drone strike
entry.summary: A fire engulfed a shopping centre in Ukraine's Sumy after Russian drone strikes hit the building. 关键事实：A fire engulfed a shopping centre in Ukraine's Sumy after Russian drone strikes hit the building.

entry.title: Trump slaps 50% tariffs on Canada and Carney vows to 'intensify' trade talks
entry.summary: The duties mark a major escalation in trade tensions between the North American neighbours. 关键事实：The duties mark a major escalation in trade tensions between the North American neighbours.

entry.title: Pentagon identifies American soldiers killed in Iranian attack in Jordan
entry.summary: 1st Lt. Tyler James Feehan, 25, and Pvt. Isabella Gonzales, 19, were killed in action in an Iranian ballistic missile and drone attack in Jordan. 关键事实：1st Lt. Tyler James Feehan, 25, and Pvt. Isabella Gonzales, 19, were killed in action in an Iranian ballistic missile and drone attack in Jordan.

entry.title: KBR organizes defense technology business to pursue Golden Dome work
entry.summary: Company points to digital engineering, space tracking and missile-defense experience 关键事实：Company points to digital engineering, space tracking and missile-defense experience

entry.title: Five Palestinians killed in fire after Israeli attack in Gaza
entry.summary: An Israeli air attack on an apartment in Gaza City set the building on fire, killing five people. 关键事实：An Israeli air attack on an apartment in Gaza City set the building on fire, killing five people.

entry.title: US Marine Corps turns to AI-powered Bullfrog as drone threats expand
entry.summary: Allen Control Systems announced Monday that the Marine Corps has chosen the Bullfrog autonomous weapon system to integrate into its airborne defenses. 关键事实：Allen Control Systems announced Monday that the Marine Corps has chosen the Bullfrog autonomous weapon system to integrate into its airborne defenses.

entry.title: US rocket-launch bottleneck worries Sweden, which just launched its first military satellite
entry.summary: The country sped up the launch due to the “severe security situation.” 关键事实：The country sped up the launch due to the “severe security situation.”

entry.title: Advancing next-gen AI with materials science innovation
entry.summary: The conversation about AI often centers on algorithms, computing power, or huge investments in new semiconductor fabrication plants and hyperscale data centers. But beneath each o… 关键事实：The conversation about AI often centers on algorithms, computing power, or huge investments in new semiconductor fabrication plants and hyperscale data centers. But beneath each o…

entry.title: From Hampton to Mars: How NASA Langley Helped Land on the Red Planet
entry.summary: Fifty years ago, NASA’s Viking 1 and 2 landers made the first successful landings on Mars, opening a new era in planetary exploration. Behind that achievement was a team at NASA’s… 关键事实：Fifty years ago, NASA’s Viking 1 and 2 landers made the first successful landings on Mars, opening a new era in planetary exploration. Behind that achievement was a team at NASA’s…
